metadata.review_notes: Initial code quality review - 8 most critical security issues extracted for immediate action. Full report contains 146 issues total (25 critical, 36 high, 46 medium, 39 low). Review full markdown report for complete findings.

tasks.title: Fix SQL injection in migration system

files_to_modify.description: Replace raw SQL execution with Alembic framework

core_functionality: Replace raw SQL migrations with Alembic migration framework
Implement migration version tracking and rollback
Add cryptographic signing for migration files
Validate all migrations before execution
security_controls: No raw SQL execution from untrusted sources
Audit trail for all migration operations
testing: Test migration application and rollback
Test invalid migration rejection
Test concurrent migration handling
Security tests for injection attempts

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use Alembic framework: alembic.config.Config, alembic.script.ScriptDirectory. Implement signing with cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric.
tasks.test_strategy: Unit tests for migration validation. Integration tests for Alembic integration. Security tests with malicious SQL payloads.
tasks.notes: Critical security issue - migration system is attack vector for database compromise

tasks.title: Fix ReDoS vulnerability in forbidden operations

files_to_modify.description: Replace nested quantifiers with possessive quantifiers

core_functionality: Refactor regex patterns to use atomic groups or possessive quantifiers
Add regex timeout protection (2 seconds max)
Test patterns with malicious inputs (10,000+ character strings)
Maintain existing detection accuracy
security_controls: Timeout protection on all regex operations
testing: Property-based tests with hypothesis library
Fuzz testing with long strings
Performance tests measuring regex execution time
Regression tests for existing detection patterns

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use re.match with timeout via signal.alarm() or regex library with timeout parameter. Replace [^|]* with (?>[^|]*) atomic group.
tasks.test_strategy: Generate strings with increasing lengths (100, 1K, 10K, 100K chars). Assert execution completes within timeout. Use hypothesis for property-based fuzzing.
success_metrics: All regex patterns complete in < 100ms for 100KB input
No catastrophic backtracking on any input
Existing forbidden operation detection still works
tasks.notes: Critical DoS vulnerability - can cause CPU exhaustion with malicious input

tasks.title: Fix path traversal in rollback operations

files_to_modify.description: Add symlink detection and path validation

core_functionality: Validate all paths with os.path.realpath() before access
Reject paths containing symlinks
Check paths against allowed directory whitelist
Add ownership verification for file operations
security_controls: Path traversal attempts detected and rejected
testing: Test symlink detection and rejection
Test path traversal attempts (../../etc/passwd)
Test boundary cases (allowed vs disallowed dirs)
Security tests with various attack vectors

tasks.implementation_guidance: Check Path.is_symlink() for all path components. Use Path.resolve() then verify result is within allowed paths. Add ownership check with os.stat().st_uid.
tasks.test_strategy: Create test symlinks in temp directory. Attempt access with various path traversal patterns. Verify all rejected appropriately.
tasks.notes: Critical security issue - allows reading arbitrary system files

tasks.title: Add path validation for file deletion in rollback

files_to_modify.description: Add path safety checks before file deletion

core_functionality: Validate all paths before deletion with _is_safe_to_delete()
Implement whitelist of allowed deletion directories
Reject deletion of system paths (/etc, /usr, /bin, etc.)
Add confirmation step for deletion operations
security_controls: Path validation before any filesystem modification
Audit logging of all deletion operations
testing: Test protected path rejection
Test allowed path deletion
Test edge cases (root, home, temp directories)
Security tests attempting to delete system files

tasks.implementation_guidance: Create PROTECTED_PATHS = ['/etc', '/usr', '/bin', '/sbin', '/System', '/Windows']. Check if file_path starts with any protected path. Only allow deletion within project directories.
tasks.test_strategy: Attempt to delete various system paths and verify rejection. Test deletion within project directories succeeds. Log all attempts for audit.
success_metrics: No system files can be deleted
Project files can be deleted when appropriate
tasks.notes: Critical security issue - attacker could delete critical system files

tasks.title: Fix cache poisoning via key injection

files_to_modify.description: Sanitize cache key inputs and add user context

core_functionality: Replace JSON serialization with canonical representation
Use HMAC with secret key for cache key generation
Include user_id/tenant_id in cache key hash
Whitelist allowed kwargs keys in cache requests
security_controls: Cache key collisions impossible with malicious input
Input sanitization on all cache operations
testing: Test identical prompts from different users get different cache keys
Test malicious kwargs injection attempts fail
Test cache key uniqueness and collision resistance
Security tests with various injection attempts

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use hashlib.sha256(hmac.new(SECRET_KEY, canonical_data, sha256).digest()).hexdigest(). Include user_id in canonical_data. Whitelist kwargs: {model, temperature, max_tokens, top_p, frequency_penalty}.
tasks.test_strategy: Generate cache keys with same prompt but different users, verify different keys. Attempt injection with __class__, __dict__ kwargs, verify rejection.
tasks.notes: Critical security issue - cache poisoning allows response manipulation and privacy leaks

tasks.title: Implement sensitive data sanitization for logging

files_to_modify.description: Add sanitization layer before storing LLM prompts/responses

core_functionality: Implement redaction patterns for API keys, passwords, tokens
Add PII detection and masking (emails, SSNs, credit cards)
Store only hash/truncated versions with opt-in for full storage
Add encryption at rest for prompts/responses fields
Implement data retention policies with automatic purging
security_controls: No secrets appear in logs or database
Encryption at rest for all sensitive fields
Data retention policy enforced (30 days default)
testing: Test secret redaction with various formats
Test PII detection (emails, SSNs, credit cards)
Test encryption/decryption of sensitive fields
Test data purging after retention period
Compliance tests for GDPR data access requests

tasks.implementation_guidance: Use presidio-analyzer for PII detection. Implement Fernet encryption for sensitive DB fields. Create sanitize_llm_data(text) function with regex patterns for secrets. Add TTL to observations table.
tasks.test_strategy: Insert prompts containing fake API keys, passwords, emails. Query database and verify all redacted. Test encryption roundtrip. Verify old data auto-purges.
success_metrics: Zero secrets or PII in logs/database
All sensitive data encrypted at rest
tasks.notes: Critical security and compliance issue - GDPR/CCPA violations, credential exposure risk

tasks.title: Fix command injection via environment variables

files_to_modify.description: Whitelist safe characters in all env vars

core_functionality: Validate ALL environment variable values
Whitelist alphanumeric + safe punctuation only
Reject variables with shell metacharacters
security_controls: All env vars validated before use
testing: Test injection attempts with various payloads
Test legitimate env vars still work
Security fuzz testing

tasks.implementation_guidance: SAFE_CHARS = re.compile(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9._/:-]+$'). Validate all env vars match pattern.
tasks.test_strategy: Attempt injection with ; && || ` $() etc. Verify all blocked.

tasks.title: Improve SQL injection detection (case-insensitive)

core_functionality: Convert to uppercase before pattern checking
Detect mixed-case SQL keywords
Add URL-encoding detection
testing: Test mixed-case SQL keywords
Test URL-encoded payloads
Test various obfuscation techniques

tasks.implementation_guidance: value_upper = value.upper() before checking. Add urllib.parse.unquote() for URL decoding.
tasks.test_strategy: Test with uNiOn SeLeCt, %55NION%20SELECT, etc. Verify all detected.
success_metrics: All SQL injection attempts detected regardless of case
tasks.notes: Critical security issue - current detection easily bypassed
